scripts.test:supervision:docker: docker build -f docker/Dockerfile.supervision -t webecho-supervision . && docker run --add-host=host.docker.internal:host-gateway -e BASE_URL=http://host.docker.internal:4000 webecho-supervision
scripts.test:full-e2e:docker: docker build -f docker/Dockerfile.full-clone-e2e -t webecho-full-e2e . && docker run --add-host=host.docker.internal:host-gateway -e BASE_URL=http://host.docker.internal:4000 -e SUPABASE_URL -e SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY -e E2E_TEST_EMAIL -e E2E_TEST_PASSWORD -e E2E_TEST_CREDITS -e E2E_CLONE_URL webecho-full-e2e
scripts.test:admin-supervision:docker: docker build -f docker/Dockerfile.admin-supervision -t webecho-admin-supervision . && docker run --add-host=host.docker.internal:host-gateway -e BASE_URL=http://host.docker.internal:4000 -e ADMIN_EMAIL -e ADMIN_PASSWORD -e ADMIN_AUTO_SEED -e DATABASE_URL webecho-admin-supervision
